name: stuttering
description: This extension changes double or triple characters into other character to avoid key combination

stuttering.escape.description: When on, an escape character can be used to prevent the stuttering to operate

stuttering.escapeCharacter.description: The escape character which will prevent the stuttering to operate (the escape character will be removed)

stuttering.mappings.description: Define suttering mapping, everytime you hit multiple times a key, a replacement is computed based on this mapping.

stuttering.smartClose.description: Use the appropriate ')', ']' or '}' when hitting one of this key

stuttering.positionMarker.description: When on, a position marker can be used to specify the position of the cursor after replacement

stuttering.positionMarkerCharacter.description: The position marker character which will specify the position of the cursor after replacement

scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint
